title: Simulation of a continuous assignment of an unpacked array throws error
body:
Simulation of the following SystemVerilog module throws an error:

```
module a (output logic b [2:1]);
  assign b = '{'b1,'bz};
endmodule: a
```

Commands:
```
iverilog -g2012 test.sv -o a.out
vvp a.out
```

Error output:
```
Unable to resolve label v0x55abf7187e10_0
compile_cleanup: 1 unresolved items
a.out: Program not runnable, 1 errors.
```

Expected behavior:
The module both compiles and simulates successfully or a human-readable error is thrown

This issue occurs in `Icarus Verilog version 13.0 (devel) (s20221226-572-gb74511974)`
